data.body: HANDOFF 2026-07-07 (RebarBotNava, worktree janitor-cleanup-0707). Progress: 15 of 19 children implemented as a stacked change, rebased onto origin/main c005f242b, PUSHED to Gerrit as changes 374-388 (relation chain); CI+review-bot running. CLOSED+certified(10): fa98 cf1b 0712 183e ecb9 c9a5 9858 e061 25bf 4428. IN_PROGRESS (implemented+pushed, close deferred until Gerrit Verified+1 per CLAUDE.local.md CI rule): 4532 9cf3 090a 6619 6c4b. OPEN remaining: 5274 -> 7c92 -> 9f40 -> 44be (in that stack order; 44be last=sub-package whole reconciler). c244 REMOVED from scope (reparent to another epic; must not remain a child at epic-close). Full continuation runbook (per-child scope, gotchas, endgame/landing/submit sequence, Gerrit vote-check + submit commands) is in session_log dire-ethnic-fallowdeer (1cba-077d-5921-4e6c) parts 1-3 — 'rebar show dire-ethnic-fallowdeer'. Stack tip 2c47c7c06. Backups: branches janitor-backup-pre-rebase, janitor-backup-pre9858fix.
